cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out between what times Andrew could have gone to the coffee shop. So he's up and about after 8am. Then, Elizabeth saw Andrew fixing their computer at the electronic store from 11am to 3pm. Then Jennifer saw him buying a bike at the bike shop from 3pm to 4pm.
